---
title: "ECON 484 Term Paper: "
output: pdf_document
author: Kennedy Jokonya
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r output=FALSE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#libs
library(class)
library(glmnet)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
library(kableExtra)

#source("scripts/riskTolerance.R")
```
